action.description: REQUIRED. The action to perform: 'update_session' to modify a session, 'update_settings' for global AI parameters, or 'save_as_new' to create a snapshot.

session_id.description: OPTIONAL. The ID of the session to update (e.g., 'persona', 'narracao'). Required only for 'update_session'.

new_content.description: OPTIONAL. The new refined text for the session. Required only for 'update_session'.

model.description: OPTIONAL. New AI model (e.g., 'gpt-5.4', 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'models/gemini-3.1-pro-preview'). Use only for 'update_settings' if requested.

temperature.description: OPTIONAL. Creativity level (0.0 to 1.0). Use only for 'update_settings' if requested.

prompt.description: OPTIONAL. New global cockpit command prompt. Use only for 'update_settings' if requested.

name.description: OPTIONAL. Commercial name for the new preset. Required only for 'save_as_new'.

description.description: OPTIONAL. Technical strategy description. Required only for 'save_as_new'.
